# Sprint 1.1 Ingestion Patterns

**Sprint:** Sprint 1. Data Ingestion
**Objective:** Design and implement data ingestion pipelines from various sources into Snowflake.

## Description
Design ingestion patterns for batch ingestion, incremental CDC, and API-based pulls. Develop data validation and quality checks.

## Deliverable
Ingestion pattern design
